title: The evolution of N, N-Dimethyltryptamine: from metabolic pathways to brain connectivity.

assets.abstract: RATIONALE: N, N-Dimethyltryptamine (DMT), a potent serotonergic psychedelic, bridges ancient wisdom and modern science. The mechanisms underlying its powerful psychedelic effects and out-of-body experiences continue to intrigue scientists. The functional role of DMT remains ambiguous. This paper explores the endogenous presence of DMT in the human body and its diverse neuroregulatory functions, which influence hierarchical brain connectivity, and the mechanisms driving its psychedelic effects. O

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.
